subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Move in remembrance of him who hath turned unto God and hath found the fragrance of the garment as it was diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی تحرک علی ذکر من اقبل الی الله و وجد نفحات القمیص اذ تضوعت بین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
